name: incident_create
description: Create a new realtime incident on a status page to communicate an ongoing issue. Specify affected components, severity, and an initial status update message. Supports realtime, scheduled, and historical incident types.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the status page.

parameters.name: incident[status]
parameters.description: Current status: investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved.

parameters.name: incident[body]
parameters.description: Initial update message body for the incident.

parameters.name: incident[impact_override]
parameters.description: Override the calculated impact: none, minor, major, critical.

parameters.name: incident[component_ids]
parameters.description: Array of component IDs affected by this incident.

parameters.name: incident[deliver_notifications]
parameters.description: Whether to send notifications to subscribers (default true).

parameters.name: incident[wants_twitter_update]
parameters.description: Whether to post an update to the linked Twitter account.

incident.name: API Performance Degradation
incident.body: We are investigating reports of increased API latency.

incident_updates.body: We are investigating reports of increased API latency.
